headline: Lovingly co-founder and technology leader focused on online floral commerce

Garland is described in Lovingly-originated materials as Joe Vega's developer co-founder, helping build a florist-specific software platform from scratch after early SEO work revealed demand from local flower shops.

headline: Founder and CEO of Erdos Miller, an engineering firm for downhole, MWD, embedded, and industrial systems
title: CEO
confidenceNote: Company team page and company-authored content directly identify Kenneth Miller as CEO and founder; secondary podcast/profile sources reinforce the same career narrative.
bioMarkdown: CEO and founder of Houston-based Erdos Miller. Miller's public company bio describes a move from automotive microcontroller work into oilfield downhole tool design, where he built an engineering and product development firm focused on practical technical and business solutions for drilling and industrial customers.
